properties.name: keycloak.admin.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for Keycloak Admin API (e.g., https://keycloak:8443/auth)

properties.name: keycloak.admin.client-id
properties.description: Keycloak client ID for admin operations (e.g., backend-client)

properties.name: keycloak.admin.client-secret
properties.description: Keycloak client secret for admin operations
